MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT TONY GARCIA MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is DENIED. A CCP 473(b) motion must be filed within six months of default's entry; defendant Saporito's motion was filed months after that statutory deadline. In any event, the motion does not demonstrate mistake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect by Saporito. Order signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ru
